---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
measurements <- read.csv("data/daily_SPEC_2014.csv.bz2")
```

```{r}
stations <- readxl::read_excel("data/aqs_sites.xlsx")
```

```{r}
measurements  <- measurements  %>% mutate(skey = as.integer(State.Code),  ckey = as.integer(County.Code),  nkey = as.integer(Site.Num))
stations <- stations %>% mutate(skey = as.integer(`State Code`),  ckey = as.integer(`County Code`),  nkey = as.integer(`Site Number`))
```

```{r}
measurements %>% filter(State.Name == "Wisconsin", Parameter.Name == "Bromine PM2.5 LC") %>% summarise(m = mean(Arithmetic.Mean, na.rm = TRUE))

```

```{r}
aggregate(Arithmetic.Mean ~ Parameter.Name, measurements, mean) %>% arrange(desc(Arithmetic.Mean))
```

```{r}
measurements %>% group_by(State.Code, County.Code, Site.Num) %>% filter(Parameter.Name == "Sulfate PM2.5 LC") %>% summarise(m = mean(Arithmetic.Mean)) %>% arrange(desc(m))
```

```{r}
california <- measurements %>% filter(Parameter.Name == "EC PM2.5 LC TOR", State.Name== "California") %>% summarise(m = mean(Arithmetic.Mean, na.rm = TRUE))
arizona <- measurements %>% filter(Parameter.Name == "EC PM2.5 LC TOR", State.Name== "Arizona") %>% summarise(m = mean(Arithmetic.Mean, na.rm = TRUE))
abs(california - arizona)
```

```{r}
measurements %>% filter(Parameter.Name == "OC PM2.5 LC TOR", Longitude < -100) %>% summarise(med = median(Arithmetic.Mean))
```

```{r}
data <- measurements %>% inner_join(stations, by= c("skey", "ckey", "nkey"))
```

```{r}
stations %>% filter(`Land Use` == "RESIDENTIAL", `Location Setting` == "SUBURBAN") %>% nrow()
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(`Land Use` == "RESIDENTIAL", `Location Setting` == "SUBURBAN", Parameter.Name == "EC PM2.5 LC TOR", Longitude.x >= -100) %>% summarise(med = median(Arithmetic.Mean, na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
data %>% 
  filter(`Land Use` == "COMMERCIAL", Parameter.Name == "Sulfate PM2.5 LC") %>%
  group_by(month = format(as.Date(Date.Local), "%m")) %>% summarise(m = mean(Arithmetic.Mean)) %>% arrange(desc(m))
```

```{r}
wide <- data %>% filter(State.Code == 6, County.Code == 65, Site.Num == 8001) %>% group_by(Date.Local, Parameter.Name) %>% summarise(day_mean = mean(Arithmetic.Mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter.Name, values_from = day_mean)
```

```{r}
sum(wide$`Sulfate PM2.5 LC` + wide$`Total Nitrate PM2.5 LC` > 10, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}

```
